recommendations.title: Withnail & I

recommendations.title: Jennifer Eight
recommendations.overview: John Berlin, a big-city cop from LA moves to a small-town police force and immediately finds himself investigating a murder. Using theories rejected by his colleagues, Berlin meets a young blind woman named Helena, whom he is attracted to. Meanwhile,

recommendations.title: The Rum Diary
recommendations.overview: Tired of the noise and madness of New York and the crushing conventions of late Eisenhower-era America, itinerant journalist Paul Kemp travels to the pristine island of Puerto Rico to write for a local San Juan newspaper run by the downtrodden editor

recommendations.title: Romeo and Juliet
recommendations.overview: Romeo Montague and Juliet Capulet fall in love against the wishes of their feuding families. Driven by their passion, the young lovers defy their destiny and elope, only to suffer the ultimate tragedy.

recommendations.title: The Story of Adèle H.
recommendations.overview: In the 19th century a mysterious woman named Adele H. crosses the ocean, from Europe to North America, to relentlessly pursue a handsome officer that denies her satisfaction.

recommendations.title: Descendants 2
recommendations.genres: Family, Fantasy, TV Movie, Adventure, Music
recommendations.overview: When the pressure to be royal becomes too much for Mal, she returns to the Isle of the Lost where her archenemy Uma, Ursula's daughter, has taken her spot as self-proclaimed queen.

recommendations.title: The Hawks and the Sparrows
recommendations.overview: A man and his son take an allegorical stroll through life with a talking bird that spouts social and political philosophy.

recommendations.title: The SpongeBob SquarePants Movie
recommendations.overview: There's trouble brewing in Bikini Bottom. Someone has stolen King Neptune's crown, and it looks like Mr. Krab, SpongeBob's boss, is the culprit. Though he's just been passed over for the promotion of his dreams, SpongeBob stands by his boss, and alon

recommendations.title: A Matter of Life and Death
recommendations.overview: A British wartime aviator who cheats death must argue for his life before a celestial court, hoping to prolong his fledgling romance with an American girl.

recommendations.title: Alesha Popovich and Tugarin the Dragon
recommendations.overview: Alesha Popovich has to catch Tugarin Zmey and bring back the stolen money with the help of a talking Horse (which talks all the time and has an opinion on everything), a wise granny, a donkey and a beauty Lyubava.
